---
title: "Mintel GNPD"
page-layout: article
---

# Mintel GNPD

**Provider:** Mintel

## Description

Global product database tracking new consumer packaged goods across food, beverage, household, beauty, health, and pet sectors. Supports product innovation and market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to create a profile using your @yale.edu email address. Find step-by-step instructions for accessing Mintel GNPD in Yale Business Answers Now.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-mintel?_ga=2.202669273.931541240.1636380257-883986010.1630510795)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
